---
title: "Arman Soleimani"
image: "files/7777E0FE-3110-4AA9-90C6-123853DF4899_1_105_c.jpeg"
about:
    template: jolla
    links:
        - icon: envelope
          href: mailto:a1soleimani@ucsd.edu
        - icon: linkedin
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arman-soleimani-2b1461a8/
---

Welcome to my website!
